name: Death Counter Popup
description: Shows a popup of a death percentage counter

enable.name: Enable
enable.description: Whether to show label at all

gold-new-best.name: Golden New Best
gold-new-best.description: The popup text will be golden if it's a new best (only applicable to runs from 0)

show-for-completed.name: Show for Completed levels
show-for-completed.description: The popup text will be shown even if the level is completed

x-position.name: Pos X
x-position.description: The horizontal position for the label. Lower = left, higher = right. Default is 100, min is 0

y-position.name: Pos Y
y-position.description: The vertical position for the label. Lower = low, higher = high. Default is 270, min is 0

rotation.name: Rotation
rotation.description: The rotation of the label. Range is -180 to 180, positive turns clockwise, negative turns counter-clockwise

issues.info: Report any issue on the Github repo
